prompt: A bookstore owner purchases 200 copies of a new novel for $12 each. He initially prices each book at $25. In the first week, he sells 60% of the books at the full price. For the second week, he applies a 20% discount to the remaining books and sells 75% of those discounted copies. Throughout this two-week period, he incurs a fixed operating cost of $300. What is the bookstore owner's net profit from this batch of books after two weeks?
